# Gap Plan

<!-- Generated by /gm-fixgap from .godotmaker/evaluation.json (plus
     .godotmaker/verify_report.json when fresh). Tasks share C/J/G
     prefixes regardless of source; the per-task `Source:` line records
     origin. Verify-source tasks dispatch before evaluation-source.

     Evaluation-source visual tasks must cite a violated SCENES.md acceptance
     criterion, mechanic/state truth requirement, or concrete readability /
     operation / layout blocker. Pure reference/style mismatch belongs in
     notes or minor_issues, not C/J tasks. -->

## Source Evaluation

- Result: {reject | approve}
- Iteration: {N}
- Generated at: {UTC ISO timestamp}

## Source Verify

<!-- Present only when this GAP.md was generated/merged with fresh
     verify_report.json failures. Omit the section entirely otherwise. -->

- verify_report.json ts: {UTC ISO timestamp}

## Critical Issues

<!-- One row per critical issue. Verify-source first, then evaluation-source. -->

### C1. {Critical Issue Title}
- **Source:** verify_report.json | evaluation.json
- **Finding:** {paste verbatim from source — verify_report.checks.* failure or evaluation.json critical_issues entry}
- **Acceptance blocker:** {SCENES.md criterion, mechanic/state truth requirement, or concrete readability/operation/layout blocker this task must resolve}
- **Affected files/systems:** {scope}
- **Fix approach:** {what the worker should do}

### C2. ...

## Major Issues

<!-- One row per major issue. Verify-source first, then evaluation-source. -->

### J1. {Major Issue Title}
- **Source:** verify_report.json | evaluation.json
- **Finding:** ...
- **Acceptance blocker:** {material non-cosmetic blocker; omit only for pure verify/tooling failures}
- **Affected files/systems:** ...
- **Fix approach:** ...

## Gameplay Issues (only if related to a critical/major)

### G1. ...
- **Source:** evaluation.json
- **Finding:** ...

## Task Status

<!-- Mirrors PLAN.md task table. Single-direction state:
     pending → in_progress → completed → verified.
     Update IMMEDIATELY when a task changes status. -->

| # | Task | Source | Status | Notes |
|---|------|--------|--------|-------|
| C1 | {Critical Issue 1 title} | verify | pending | |
| C2 | {Critical Issue 2 title} | evaluation | pending | |
| J1 | {Major Issue 1 title} | verify | pending | |
| G1 | {Gameplay Issue 1 title} | evaluation | pending | |
